title: PancakeBunny - REKT 2
relevance_summary: Deposit followed by large deposit to MiniChefV2 and subsequent withdrawal to exploit minter

prevention.rule: Block any tx that deposits to a vault and immediately makes a large deposit to MiniChefV2 followed by a withdrawAll call.

red_flags: Deposit to vault, large deposit to MiniChefV2, withdrawAll
summary: The attacker deposited small amounts into a vault and a large amount into MiniChefV2, then executed withdrawAll to exploit the minter. A guard could have blocked such transactions.
